chunks.title: Solomon's Accession and Sacrifice at Gibeon
chunks.reason: Describes Solomon's rise to power and the assembly's journey to Gibeon for worship.

chunks.title: God's Offer and Solomon's Request for Wisdom
chunks.reason: Records the divine appearance, Solomon's prayer for wisdom, and God's favorable response.

chunks.title: Solomon's Reign and Wealth
chunks.reason: Details Solomon's return to Jerusalem, military buildup, and economic prosperity.
